regions.name: Beijing, Tianjin & Hebei
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (April-May) or autumn (September-October) to avoid harsh winters and summer heat.

regions.name: Northeast (Manchuria)
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in summer (June-August) for comfortable weather, or winter (December-February) for snow festivals.

regions.name: Inner Mongolia
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in summer (June-September) for grassland exploration and ideal weather conditions.

regions.name: Yellow River Region
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (March-May) or autumn (September-November) for pleasant weather and clear skies.

regions.name: East Coast
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (April-May) or autumn (September-October) to avoid summer humidity and typhoons.

regions.name: Yangtze River Region
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (March-May) or autumn (September-October) for moderate temperatures and scenic beauty.

regions.name: South Central
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (March-May) or autumn (September-November) to avoid hot, humid summers.

regions.name: Guangdong & South
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in autumn (October-November) or winter (December-February) for cool, dry weather.

regions.name: Southwest
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (March-May) or autumn (September-November) for mild weather and stunning scenery.

regions.name: Yunnan
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (March-May) or autumn (September-November) for pleasant temperatures across diverse elevations.

regions.name: Tibet
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in summer (June-September) when mountain passes are open and weather is most stable.

regions.name: Sichuan
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (March-May) or autumn (September-November) to enjoy clear skies and moderate temperatures.

regions.name: Shaanxi
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (April-May) or autumn (September-October) for ideal weather and clear visibility.

regions.name: Gansu & Ningxia
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in summer (June-September) for the most accessible weather and clear desert skies.

regions.name: Xinjiang
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in summer (June-September) for open mountain passes and stable desert weather.

regions.name: Qinghai
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in summer (June-September) when high-altitude lakes and mountains are most accessible.

regions.name: Shanxi
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (April-May) or autumn (September-October) for mild weather and clear skies.

regions.name: Henan
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (April-May) or autumn (September-October) to avoid extreme summer heat.

regions.name: Anhui & Jiangsu
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (March-May) or autumn (September-October) for pleasant weather and scenic beauty.

regions.name: Zhejiang
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (April-May) or autumn (September-October) to enjoy moderate temperatures.

regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (March-May) or autumn (September-November) to avoid typhoon season.

regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (March-May) or autumn (October-November) for mild weather and clear views.

regions.name: Guizhou
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (March-May) or autumn (September-November) for scenic beauty and mild weather.
